## 3. `interests` — why this Bill, by this peer

Sponsor's Category 1 (remunerated employment) interests.

- Director, CHconserve Ltd (company to manage the member’s advisory work; clients listed below)
- Director, CHedserve Ltd (professional education)
- Director, Calcaneum UK Limited (new technologies advisory; clients listed below)
- Adviser, BPP University (advice given on diversity and inclusion; environmental, social, and corporate governance; and fintech)
- Adviser on fintech and financial inclusion to Ecospend Ltd (open banking technologies) (interest ceased 30 November 2025)
- Adviser, Members Capital Management (advice given was on strategic issues across capital markets, asset management, digital assets and financial technology) (interest ceased 20 November 2025)
- Speaking engagement, 12 May 2025, ICMSA [International Capital Market Services Association], London
- Speaking engagement, 15 May 2025, Institute of Directors [Kent chapter], London

## 11. `treaties` — Council of Europe AI Framework

_Negative finding:_ the Treaties API returns **0 items** for "artificial intelligence" — i.e. the Council of Europe AI Framework Convention has not been laid under CRaG.

## 30. AI Security Institute — hand-templated factoid

```turtle
@prefix dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> .
@prefix govuk: <https://forgetmenot.local/govuk#> .
@prefix schema1: <http://schema.org/> .

<https://www.gov.uk/government/organisations/ai-security-institute> a schema1:GovernmentOrganization,
        govuk:Organisation ;
    dcterms:isPartOf <https://www.gov.uk/government> ;
    dcterms:modified "2025-02-14T09:12:49+00:00" ;
    schema1:name "AI Security Institute"@en ;
    schema1:url <https://www.gov.uk/government/organisations/ai-security-institute> ;
    govuk:contentId "3a279946-1880-410e-ad4e-eb3cef22e210" ;
    govuk:publishingApp "whitehall" ;
    govuk:schemaName "organisation" .
```

## 31. AI Security Institute — JSON-LD + RDFa + microdata

```json
{
  "counts": {
    "jsonld": 24,
    "rdfa": 14,
    "microdata": 0
  },
  "dropped": {
    "jsonld": 1,
    "rdfa": 0,
    "microdata": 0
  }
}
```
Crucially, JSON-LD `schema:parentOrganization` resolves to **DSIT** — the same `answeringBodyId: 216` that answered the sponsor's AI written question in §9. The Parliament record and the GOV.UK graph reconcile on a single org.
